use_cases: Visualizing CPU architecture and processor connections for educational purposes
Technical documentation for hardware specifications and chip design
Developer tool interfaces showing system architecture diagrams
Learning materials for computer science and electronics courses
ai_summary: An SVG-based CPU architecture diagram component that renders a stylized processor visualization with animated connection paths and markers. Features configurable text labels, optional line and marker animations, and customizable dimensions. Perfect for technical documentation, educational content, or developer tool interfaces needing to display hardware architecture.
